requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — INNORPI / NT标准（与ETSI / IEC对接）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — INNORPI / NT標準（與ETSI / IEC對接）

summary.en: Tunisia's INNORPI (Institut National de la Normalisation et de la Propriété Industrielle) publishes NT (Norme Tunisienne) standards that adopt ETSI, IEC, and ISO references. EMC compliance for wireless devices is assessed against NT standards aligned with ETSI EN 300 328 (Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz), ETSI EN 301 893 (Wi-Fi 5 GHz), ETSI EN 300 440 (Bluetooth / short-range), and CISPR/IEC 61000 series for conducted and radiated emissions. Test reports must be from a recognised laboratory; INNORPI NT standards are referenced during INT homologation technical review.
summary.zh: 突尼斯INNORPI（国家标准化与工业产权研究院）发布采纳ETSI、IEC及ISO参考标准的NT（突尼斯国家标准）。无线设备的电磁兼容合规依据与ETSI EN 300 328（Wi-Fi 2.4GHz）、ETSI EN 301 893（Wi-Fi 5GHz）、ETSI EN 300 440（蓝牙/短距离）及CISPR/IEC 61000系列（传导及辐射骚扰）对接的NT标准进行评估。测试报告须来自认可实验室；INNORPI NT标准在INT型式核准技术审查中被引用。
summary.zht: 突尼斯INNORPI（國家標準化與工業產權研究院）發布採納ETSI、IEC及ISO參考標準的NT（突尼斯國家標準）。無線裝置的電磁相容合規依據與ETSI EN 300 328（Wi-Fi 2.4GHz）、ETSI EN 301 893（Wi-Fi 5GHz）、ETSI EN 300 440（藍牙/短距離）及CISPR/IEC 61000系列（傳導及輻射騷擾）對接的NT標準進行評估。測試報告須來自認可實驗室；INNORPI NT標準在INT型式核准技術審查中被引用。

standards_or_laws: INNORPI NT standards (adopting ETSI EN 300 328, ETSI EN 301 893, ETSI EN 300 440)
CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-4 series (conducted and radiated EMC emissions / immunity)
INT homologation technical review referencing INNORPI/NT standards

summary.en: China EMC compliance for wireless devices is governed by GB 9254 (information technology equipment radiated and conducted emissions) and GB 17625 (harmonic current emissions / power quality), with radio-specific performance requirements under GB/T 22450 and related standards. CCC covers some EMC requirements for applicable product categories. Chinese GB EMC standards are not directly equivalent to INNORPI NT / ETSI-aligned standards.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备的电磁兼容合规受GB 9254（信息技术设备辐射及传导骚扰）和GB 17625（谐波电流骚扰/电能质量）约束，无线电性能要求参照GB/T 22450及相关标准。CCC在适用产品类别中涵盖部分电磁兼容要求。中国GB电磁兼容标准与INNORPI NT / ETSI对接标准不直接等同。
summary.zht: 中國無線裝置的電磁相容合規受GB 9254（資訊技術設備輻射及傳導騷擾）和GB 17625（諧波電流騷擾/電能品質）約束，無線電性能要求參照GB/T 22450及相關標準。CCC在適用產品類別中涵蓋部分電磁相容要求。中國GB電磁相容標準與INNORPI NT / ETSI對接標準不直接等同。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics)
CCC for applicable product categories (partial EMC coverage)

gap.en: Chinese GB-series EMC test reports are not accepted by INT or INNORPI as evidence of compliance with NT standards. ETSI or IEC-aligned test reports from a laboratory accredited for the relevant INNORPI NT standards are required for INT homologation. Separate EMC and radio performance test reports based on ETSI references must be commissioned even if valid Chinese CCC/SRRC test reports exist.
gap.zh: 中国GB系列电磁兼容测试报告不被INT或INNORPI接受作为符合NT标准的合规证明。INT型式核准要求来自经认可实验室（针对相关INNORPI NT标准）的ETSI或IEC对接测试报告。即使已持有有效的中国CCC/SRRC测试报告，仍须另行委托基于ETSI参考标准的电磁兼容及无线电性能测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB系列電磁相容測試報告不被INT或INNORPI接受作為符合NT標準的合規證明。INT型式核准要求來自經認可實驗室（針對相關INNORPI NT標準）的ETSI或IEC對接測試報告。即使已持有有效的中國CCC/SRRC測試報告，仍須另行委託基於ETSI參考標準的電磁相容及無線電性能測試報告。

source.publisher: INNORPI — Institut National de la Normalisation et de la Propriété Industrielle (Tunisia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB-series EMC test reports do not satisfy INNORPI NT / ETSI-aligned EMC requirements for INT homologation in Tunisia. ETSI or IEC-referenced test reports from a recognised laboratory must be obtained specifically for the Tunisian homologation process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB系列电磁兼容测试报告不满足突尼斯INT型式核准所要求的INNORPI NT / ETSI对接电磁兼容要求。须专门为突尼斯型式核准程序从认可实验室获取基于ETSI或IEC参考标准的测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB系列電磁相容測試報告不滿足突尼斯INT型式核准所要求的INNORPI NT / ETSI對接電磁相容要求。須專門為突尼斯型式核准程序從認可實驗室獲取基於ETSI或IEC參考標準的測試報告。

requirement_topic.zh: 产品标注 — 阿拉伯语及法语（双语）
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標注 — 阿拉伯語及法語（雙語）

summary.en: Product labelling and user documentation for wireless devices sold in Tunisia must be provided in both Arabic and French. The INT homologation certificate reference number must appear on the product label. Mandatory label elements include product name, model number, manufacturer name and address, INT homologation number, applicable frequency bands, input voltage and frequency (230 V / 50 Hz), and country of origin. Arabic is an official language of Tunisia; French is widely used commercially. Labels in Chinese only, or in English only, are not acceptable for retail sale.
summary.zh: 在突尼斯销售的无线设备的产品标注及用户文件须以阿拉伯语和法语双语提供。产品标签须标注INT型式核准证书编号。强制标注内容包括：产品名称、型号、制造商名称及地址、INT型式核准号、适用频段、输入电压及频率（230V/50Hz）和原产国。阿拉伯语是突尼斯官方语言，法语在商业领域广泛使用。仅以中文或仅以英文标注的标签不可用于零售销售。
summary.zht: 在突尼斯銷售的無線裝置的產品標注及用戶文件須以阿拉伯語和法語雙語提供。產品標籤須標注INT型式核准證書編號。強制標注內容包括：產品名稱、型號、製造商名稱及地址、INT型式核准號、適用頻段、輸入電壓及頻率（230V/50Hz）和原產國。阿拉伯語是突尼斯官方語言，法語在商業領域廣泛使用。僅以中文或僅以英文標注的標籤不可用於零售銷售。

standards_or_laws: Code des Télécommunications — Loi 2001-1 (Tunisia) — INT homologation number label requirement
Tunisian consumer protection and labelling regulations requiring Arabic and French
INT certificate reference: mandatory on product label per homologation conditions

summary.en: Chinese product labelling for wireless devices requires Mandarin Chinese on the product label and user manual, including CCC mark (where applicable), SRRC approval number, model, manufacturer name and address, input voltage, and country of origin. English is commonly included for export products but is not a regulatory requirement for domestic Chinese market. Arabic and French labelling are not required for Chinese domestic market compliance.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备的产品标注要求在产品标签和用户手册上使用普通话中文，包括CCC标志（如适用）、SRRC批准号、型号、制造商名称及地址、输入电压和原产地。出口产品通常包含英文，但并非中国国内市场的监管要求。中国国内市场合规不要求阿拉伯语或法语标注。
summary.zht: 中國無線裝置的產品標注要求在產品標籤和用戶手冊上使用普通話中文，包括CCC標誌（如適用）、SRRC批准號、型號、製造商名稱及地址、輸入電壓和原產地。出口產品通常包含英文，但並非中國國內市場的監管要求。中國國內市場合規不要求阿拉伯語或法語標注。

standards_or_laws: GB standards and CCC label requirements (Mandarin Chinese)
SRRC approval number label requirement (MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016)

gap.en: Chinese-language or English-only product labels do not satisfy Tunisia's bilingual Arabic and French labelling requirement. The INT homologation certificate number, which does not exist until INT approval is obtained, must be printed on the product label — meaning label artwork cannot be finalised until INT homologation is granted. New label designs in Arabic and French must be commissioned before products can be placed on the Tunisian market.
gap.zh: 中文或纯英文产品标签不满足突尼斯阿拉伯语及法语双语标注要求。INT型式核准证书编号须印于产品标签上，而该编号在INT批准前不存在——这意味着标签版面在获得INT型式核准前无法最终定稿。须委托设计阿拉伯语及法语新标签，方可将产品投放突尼斯市场。
gap.zht: 中文或純英文產品標籤不滿足突尼斯阿拉伯語及法語雙語標注要求。INT型式核准證書編號須印於產品標籤上，而該編號在INT批准前不存在——這意味著標籤版面在獲得INT型式核准前無法最終定稿。須委託設計阿拉伯語及法語新標籤，方可將產品投放突尼斯市場。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese-language-only or English-only product labels do not meet Tunisian bilingual Arabic and French labelling requirements. New label artwork incorporating the INT homologation number in both Arabic and French must be produced before products may be sold in Tunisia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 纯中文或纯英文产品标签不符合突尼斯阿拉伯语及法语双语标注要求。须制作包含INT型式核准号的阿拉伯语及法语双语新标签版面，方可在突尼斯销售产品。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 純中文或純英文產品標籤不符合突尼斯阿拉伯語及法語雙語標注要求。須製作包含INT型式核准號的阿拉伯語及法語雙語新標籤版面，方可在突尼斯銷售產品。
